question: Will there be a trillionaire by June 2026?
textDescription:
Resolves Yes if an individual person's net worth is confidently estimated at or above 1 trillion USD before 1 June '26.

Otherwise resolves No on 1 June '26.

Update 2026-03-10 (PST) (AI summary of creator comment): Elon Musk's self-claim of being a trillionaire will not be sufficient for Yes resolution. The creator will wait for a more formal/authoritative estimate of net worth.
newsShortReason: Elon Musk's net worth is estimated at $833.1 billion as of May 27, 2026.
newsKeyEvidence: Elon Musk's net worth is estimated at $833.1 billion as of May 27, 2026. | SpaceX's IPO is expected to value the company between $1.75 and $2 trillion, but Musk's stake is 40%. | Even with the IPO, Musk's net worth is unlikely to reach $1 trillion by June 2026.
